title: Launch Page — Final Asset Sign-Off
author: priya.mehta
content:
# Launch Page — Final Asset Sign-Off

**Date:** April 24, 2026, 5:00 PM PT
**Author:** Priya Mehta, Design Lead

## Status: FINAL

All design assets for the Checkout AI Assistant launch page have been reviewed, approved, and delivered to the Engineering handoff folder.

## Delivered Assets
- Hero image (1440px, 768px, 375px breakpoints) ✓
- CTA button states (default, hover, active, disabled) ✓
- Product screenshots — Checkout AI flow (5 screens) ✓
- NovaLoop wordmark + lockup variations ✓
- Social preview image (1200x630) ✓
- Favicon package ✓

## Copy Sign-Off
All page copy reviewed and approved by Alice Chen (Product) and Sam Okafor (GTM). No further changes expected.

## Notes
The launch page is final and ready to ship. Engineering has everything they need for implementation. No design changes are expected before go-live.

## Handoff Location
Figma: NovaLoop / Launch Alpha / Launch Page — FINAL HANDOFF

**Signed off by:** Priya Mehta (Design), Alice Chen (Product)
